arts.ttl: Barcelona's 125th anniversary: Greatest XI, key moments in club's history
arts.sum: As Barcelona celebrate their 125th birthday, let's revisit the club's most significant moments and see which star players fit into our all-time XIs.

arts.ttl: Barcelona defender a serious doubt for Las Palmas clash
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Inigo Martinez has been playing almost every game this season at the age of 33, but is set to miss out against Las Palmas due to injury. The Basque defender has been a leader at the back from day one for Hansi Flick, and alongside Pau Cubarsi, has set the tone for their […] The post Barcelona defender a serious doubt for Las Palmas clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Pedri contract negotiations with Barcelona approach finish line
arts.sum: Barcelona have made Pedri their top priority when it comes to their host of players that are out of contract next season, and are close to getting a deal over the line for the Canary Islander. arts.ttl: Haaland and Rodri nominated for Fifa men's award
arts.sum: Manchester City's Rodri and Erling Haaland are nominated in the best male player category at the 2024 Fifa Best Awards.
Joe Champion has provided a score prediction for all 10 matches taking place in LaLiga on Friday, Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: De Jong’s future back in the headlines amid Barca struggles
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future is once again headline news as the Dutchman struggles to make an impact at Barcelona on his return from injury. In the wake of all this, Mundo Deportivo are reporting that Barca consider their most recent contract offer to De Jong to have expired.

arts.ttl: ‘Proud doesn’t cover it’ - Gavi’s physio sends out emotional message
arts.sum: Barcelona physio Pablo Merino has sent out a message to Gavi after seeing the midfielder make a successful recovery from ACL surgery. The midfielder went under the knife a year ago
